reasons: Chou can kick a target into a predictable location, giving Pharsa a clean long-range burst window.
Pharsa can follow from safer distance instead of entering melee range.

proof.summary: Chou isolates a target, while Pharsa punishes the displaced target with long-range burst.
worksBestWhen: Chou kicks the target toward Pharsa's cast area or away from cover.
Pharsa is positioned to follow before Chou starts the kick.
failureCases: The target escapes before the follow-up lands.

reasons: Chou can isolate one target and hold their movement long enough for Lunox to commit her burst sequence.
Lunox gives strong magic follow-up after Chou displaces a priority target into a predictable position.

proof.summary: Chou creates the single-target displacement window, and Lunox follows with magic burst before the target can reset.
worksBestWhen: Chou kicks the target toward Lunox or into her spell range.
Lunox has the correct power state ready before Chou starts the pickoff.
failureCases: Chou kicks the target away from Lunox's range.
Lunox is forced to use defensive tools before the burst follow-up.

reasons: Chou's knock-up or kick can hold a target long enough for Gord to land stun and damage.
Gord benefits when Chou turns a mobile enemy into a predictable target.

proof.summary: Chou starts the control chain, then Gord follows with stun and sustained magic damage.
worksBestWhen: Chou does not kick the target out of Gord's skill line.
Gord holds his stun or main damage for the displacement window.
failureCases: Gord is forced to reposition before using his follow-up.
Chou kicks the target outside Gord's cast angle.

reasons: Kagura can follow Chou's displacement with umbrella burst and control.
The combo is strong when Chou delivers the target into Kagura's prepared umbrella path.

proof.summary: Chou isolates the target, while Kagura finishes with umbrella damage and control.
worksBestWhen: Kagura tracks Chou's kick direction before committing her combo.
Chou kicks the target toward Kagura's umbrella path.
failureCases: Chou kicks the target away from Kagura's setup.
Kagura commits before the target path is clear.

reasons: Angela gives Chou extra safety when he dives deep for a kick.
This helps Chou survive after spending mobility to start the play.

proof.summary: Angela protects Chou during the engage, letting him commit more safely to displacement plays.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before Chou enters the enemy backline.
Chou uses the protection to secure a meaningful displacement target.
